summary: Contractors All Risks insurance covering construction projects against physical loss or damage during the construction period. JCT and NEC contract aligned. Complex project-based policy with project value, duration, and contractor-specific risk factors.

schemaEntities.description: Construction project entity. Custom: ProjectType, ContractValue, ProjectDuration, ContractForm_JCT_NEC, PrincipalContractor, CSDDDate, PCDate, HandoverDate, RetentionPeriod, GroundConditionSurvey, FloodplainFlag, ProjectManagementSystem, BIMLevel.

122 rules: contract value to TPL adequacy check, JCT vs NEC form validation, groundwork below/above water table triggers, retention period DSU eligibility, BIM compliance discount, project duration extension premium adjustment.
Subcontractor entity. Custom: SubcontractorValue, TradeType, CompetenceScheme, CISSafetyFlag, SubcontractForm, BackToBackRequirement.

relationships.note: Contract works limit = contract value + professional fees -- 13 project fields involved
Subcontractor scheduling -- no direct GW Cloud sub-schedule entity pattern
122 rules include project duration, contract form, and ground condition triggers

migrationIssues.detail: ConstructionProject_CAR has 13 custom fields. No standard GW Cloud construction project entity. New entity design required for GW Cloud migration.
Premium adjustment on project completion/extension is time-based. GW Cloud transaction model does not natively support project duration adjustments -- custom transaction type required.
JCT and NEC contract form validation and coverage alignment. 122 Gosu rules reference contract form type -- rule migration required for GW Cloud.
Dynamic subcontractor scheduling with back-to-back requirements. GW Cloud has no native contractor schedule -- custom entity and workflow required.
BIM Level 2/3 discount not in GW Cloud rating framework -- custom discount table required.

cloudMapping.action: Direct mapping -- GW Cloud project entity field
Custom extension field required -- BIM discount table
Subcontractor schedule entity requires new GW Cloud design
122 rules require review -- JCT/NEC contract form logic needs migration
